summary: The user is focused on improving their social media presence for their freelance writing business, specifically on Twitter and Instagram, by utilizing researched hashtags and planning content in advance. They have observed increased engagement through specific strategies and are considering a hybrid approach to posting schedules and content planning.
facts: The user is a freelance writer looking to improve their social media presence. The user has noticed that using researched hashtags on Twitter increased their comments, with one post receiving 5 comments after using them. The user focuses on self-care and mindfulness content on Instagram. The user has been posting daily for a week using different self-care themes, which seemed to help engagement. The user plans to create a content calendar to organize their posts in advance. The user intends to post at the same time most days but will mix it up occasionally to reach a broader audience. The user has been using Instagram for a while and has seen increased engagement with specific hashtags related to self-care and mindfulness. The user is excited to plan out their content in advance to see how it affects their engagement.
